w:document.mc:Ignorable: w14 w15 w16se w16cid w16 w16cex w16sdtdh w16sdtfl w16du wp14

w:r.w:t: R-LUME Suspension is an effective antimalarial formulation containing the combination of Artemether and Lumefantrine, recommended for the treatment of uncomplicated malaria caused by

. Artemether acts rapidly to reduce the malaria parasite load, while Lumefantrine provides sustained action to eliminate residual parasites and prevent recurrence. This combination therapy offers fast symptom relief, high cure rates, and improved treatment outcomes. R-LUME Suspension is especially suitable for pediatric patients due to its easy-to-administer liquid formulation. It should be taken as prescribed by a healthcare professional, preferably with food or milk to enhance absorption and maximize effectiveness.

is a broad-spectrum macrolide antibiotic used for the treatment of various bacterial infections, including respiratory tract infections, tonsillitis, sinusitis, ear infections, skin and soft tissue infections, and certain sexually transmitted diseases. It works by inhibiting bacterial protein synthesis, thereby stopping

the growth and spread of bacteria. IZ 500 offers the advantages of once-daily dosing, good tissue penetration, and a shorter treatment duration, which helps improve patient compliance. It should be taken only as prescribed by a healthcare professional, and the full course must be completed to prevent antibiotic resistance and recurrence of infection.

contains Levofloxacin 500 mg, a broad-spectrum fluoroquinolone antibiotic used to treat a wide range of bacterial infections. It is effective in managing respiratory tract infections, urinary tract infections, skin and soft tissue infections, gastrointestinal infections, and certain other bacterial diseases. Levofloxacin works by inhibiting bacterial DNA replication, leading to the destruction of susceptible bacteria.
500 offers excellent tissue penetration, convenient once-daily dosing, and high clinical efficacy. It should be used only under medical supervision and the full prescribed
course should be completed to ensure successful treatment and help prevent antibiotic resistance.
is a hematinic and nutritional supplement containing
Sodium Feredetate, Pyridoxine Hydrochloride (Vitamin B6), Cyanocobalamin (Vitamin B12), and Folic Acid

, formulated to prevent and treat iron deficiency anemia and nutritional deficiencies. It helps in the formation of healthy red blood cells, improves hemoglobin levels, and supports oxygen transport throughout the body. The combination of iron, folic acid, and essential B vitamins enhances erythropoiesis, reduces fatigue, weakness, and anemia-related symptoms, and promotes overall health and vitality. FEKEY Syrup is suitable for children, adults, pregnant women, and patients requiring nutritional supplementation under medical supervision.
Each film coated tablet contains: Ciprofloxacin Hydrochloride BP
Equivalent to Ciprofloxacin …………………………… 500 mg Tinidazole BP………………………..……………………… 600 mg Excipient …………………………………………………………..q.s.
is a combination antimicrobial formulation containing

, used for the treatment of mixed bacterial and protozoal infections. Ciprofloxacin, a broad-spectrum fluoroquinolone antibiotic, effectively eliminates susceptible bacteria, while Tinidazole acts against protozoa and anaerobic bacteria. This dual-action therapy is commonly prescribed for gastrointestinal infections, acute diarrhea, dysentery, abdominal infections, gynecological infections, and mixed infections requiring broad antimicrobial coverage. CIPOTAX provides rapid symptom relief, high therapeutic efficacy, and convenient dosing. It should be taken as directed by a healthcare professional, and the full prescribed course should be completed to ensure effective treatment and prevent antimicrobial resistance.
is a non-steroidal anti-inflammatory drug (NSAID) containing

, widely used to relieve pain, inflammation, and stiffness associated with musculoskeletal and joint disorders. It is indicated for conditions such as osteoarthritis, rheumatoid arthritis, ankylosing spondylitis, back pain, sprains, and other inflammatory conditions.

works by inhibiting cyclooxygenase (COX) enzymes, reducing the production of prostaglandins responsible for pain and inflammation. ACOFAN provides effective, long-lasting pain relief with good gastrointestinal tolerability compared to some traditional NSAIDs, helping patients regain mobility, improve daily function, and enhance overall quality of life.
is a fast-acting antimalarial indicated for the initial treatment of severe and complicated malaria, especially infections caused by

. Administered via intramuscular injection, artemether rapidly reduces parasite load by generating free radicals that damage essential parasite proteins and membranes, leading to parasite death. Its rapid onset of action helps control severe symptoms and stabilize patients until oral antimalarial therapy can be initiated. R-LUME Injection is well tolerated, provides reliable efficacy, and plays a vital role in reducing malaria-related morbidity and mortality when used according to recommended treatment guidelines.
AMLOCLASS AT® Tablets (Amlodipine 5 mg + Atenolol 50 mg)
is a fixed-dose combination indicated for the effective management of hypertension and chronic stable angina. It combines
, a calcium channel blocker that relaxes blood vessels, with

, a selective beta-blocker that reduces heart rate and cardiac workload. This dual mechanism provides superior blood pressure control, improves myocardial oxygen balance, and reduces the risk of cardiovascular complications. AMLOCLASS AT offers convenient once-daily dosing, enhances patient compliance, and delivers sustained 24-hour blood pressure control, making it an effective choice for long-term cardiovascular protection and improved quality of life.
Omeprazole USP………20 mg (As Enteric Coated capsules)

is a proton pump inhibitor (PPI) indicated for the treatment and prevention of acid-related gastrointestinal disorders, including gastroesophageal reflux disease (GERD), gastric and duodenal ulcers, erosive esophagitis, and Zollinger–Ellison syndrome. Omeprazole works by irreversibly inhibiting the gastric proton pump (H

-ATPase), providing potent and long-lasting suppression of gastric acid secretion. IPOZOLE effectively relieves symptoms such as heartburn and acid reflux, promotes ulcer healing, and helps prevent recurrence. With convenient once-daily dosing, it offers reliable symptom control, improves patient comfort, and enhances overall gastrointestinal health and quality of life.
CEFEZONE® 1 g Injection (Ceftriaxone for Injection USP)

is a third-generation cephalosporin antibiotic indicated for the treatment of a wide range of bacterial infections, including respiratory tract, urinary tract, skin and soft tissue, intra-abdominal, bone and joint infections,

, and bacterial meningitis. It works by inhibiting bacterial cell wall synthesis, leading to rapid bacterial death. CEFEZONE offers broad-spectrum antibacterial coverage, excellent tissue penetration, and a long elimination half-life that supports convenient once-daily dosing in many infections. Administered via IV or IM route, it provides reliable clinical efficacy, improves patient outcomes, and helps reduce infection-related complications.

is a proton pump inhibitor (PPI) indicated for the treatment and prevention of acid-related gastrointestinal disorders, including gastroesophageal reflux disease (GERD), gastric and duodenal ulcers, erosive esophagitis, and
eradication when used in combination with appropriate antibiotics. Rabeprazole works by irreversibly inhibiting the gastric H

-ATPase (proton pump), providing rapid, potent, and sustained suppression of gastric acid secretion. FIZO effectively relieves heartburn, acid reflux, and ulcer-related symptoms while promoting mucosal healing. With convenient once-daily dosing and excellent tolerability, FIZO improves patient comfort, supports long-term gastrointestinal health, and enhances quality of life.

ACUMOL® Tablets (Aceclofenac + Paracetamol) is a synergistic analgesic and anti-inflammatory combination indicated for the effective management of pain, inflammation, and fever associated with osteoarthritis, rheumatoid arthritis, ankylosing spondylitis, musculoskeletal disorders, dental pain, postoperative pain, and soft tissue injuries. Aceclofenac reduces inflammation by inhibiting cyclooxygenase (COX) enzymes, while Paracetamol provides rapid pain relief and antipyretic action through central mechanisms. ACUMOL offers fast and sustained relief from acute and chronic painful conditions, improves joint mobility and physical function, and is generally well tolerated. Its dual-action formula enhances patient comfort, accelerates recovery, and improves overall quality of life.
is a high-strength artemisinin-based combination therapy (ACT) indicated for the treatment of uncomplicated

malaria, including infections caused by multidrug-resistant strains. Artemether rapidly reduces parasite burden through free radical-mediated parasite destruction, while lumefantrine, with its longer half-life, eliminates residual parasites and helps prevent recrudescence. This complementary dual mechanism ensures rapid symptom relief, high cure rates, and reduced risk of resistance. R-LUME 80/480 offers a convenient dosing regimen for adults, excellent tolerability, and reliable efficacy, supporting complete parasite clearance and improved patient recovery.

is a phosphodiesterase type-5 (PDE-5) inhibitor indicated for the treatment of erectile dysfunction (ED) in adult men. Sildenafil enhances the natural erectile response by inhibiting PDE-5, increasing cyclic guanosine monophosphate (cGMP) levels, and promoting smooth muscle relaxation with improved blood flow to the penile tissues during sexual stimulation. SIDEGRA helps achieve and maintain a firm erection, improves sexual performance, and enhances confidence and quality of life. Available in
, it offers flexible dosing, rapid onset of action, and a well-established safety and efficacy profile when used as directed.

is a nutritional appetite stimulant formulated to help improve appetite and support healthy weight gain in individuals experiencing loss of appetite due to illness, recovery, nutritional deficiencies, or general weakness. It provides essential nutrients that help stimulate hunger, improve food intake, and enhance overall nutritional status. APPLIFT Syrup supports healthy growth in children, promotes recovery in convalescent patients, and helps restore energy and vitality in adults. With its pleasant taste and easy-to-administer liquid formulation, APPLIFT is suitable for patients of all ages, helping improve appetite, nutritional intake, physical strength, and overall well-being

is a gentle pediatric formulation designed to relieve common digestive discomforts in infants and young children, including colic, gas, bloating, hiccups, and stomach cramps. Its soothing blend of carefully selected ingredients helps relax the digestive tract, promotes comfortable digestion, and reduces fussiness and crying associated with gastrointestinal discomfort. KIDJOY Gripe Water is easy to administer, pleasant tasting, and suitable for routine infant care when used as directed. By providing fast, gentle relief from tummy troubles, KIDJOY helps babies feel more comfortable, supports restful sleep, and offers reassurance and convenience for parents and caregivers.

is a long-acting calcium channel blocker indicated for the treatment of hypertension and chronic stable or vasospastic angina. Amlodipine works by relaxing vascular smooth muscle, causing peripheral vasodilation that lowers blood pressure and improves blood flow to the heart. This reduces cardiac workload, relieves angina symptoms, and decreases the risk of cardiovascular complications such as stroke and heart attack. Available in

, AMLOCLASS offers flexible dose titration, convenient once-daily administration, sustained 24-hour blood pressure control, excellent tolerability, and effective long-term cardiovascular protection for a wide range of patients.
IMUCLAV® 1125 Tablets (Amoxicillin 1000 mg + Potassium Clavulanate 125 mg)

is a broad-spectrum antibiotic combination indicated for the treatment of susceptible bacterial infections, including respiratory tract, ear, nose and throat, urinary tract, skin and soft tissue, dental, and bone and joint infections. Amoxicillin inhibits bacterial cell wall synthesis, while clavulanate protects it from degradation by beta-lactamase enzymes, extending its antibacterial spectrum. This synergistic combination provides reliable coverage against beta-lactamase–producing bacteria, ensuring effective infection control. IMUCLAV 1125 offers high clinical efficacy, excellent tissue penetration, and convenient dosing, promoting faster recovery, reducing complications, and improving overall patient outcomes.
is a convenient fixed-dose combination therapy indicated for the syndromic management of mixed genital and reproductive tract infections, including bacterial, protozoal, and fungal infections.
provides broad-spectrum antibacterial coverage against susceptible sexually transmitted pathogens, and

infections. This triple-action combination offers comprehensive coverage in a single treatment regimen, improving patient compliance and clinical outcomes. AFSC KIT helps achieve rapid symptom relief, effective eradication of causative organisms, reduced recurrence, and supports better reproductive and sexual health when used as prescribed.
CEFEZONE-S® Injection 1.5 g (Ceftriaxone 1 g + Sulbactam 0.5 g)

is a broad-spectrum injectable antibiotic combination indicated for the treatment of moderate to severe bacterial infections, including respiratory tract, urinary tract, intra-abdominal, skin and soft tissue, bone and joint infections, septicemia, and gynecological infections.
inhibits bacterial cell wall synthesis, while

is a beta-lactamase inhibitor that protects ceftriaxone from enzymatic degradation, extending its antibacterial spectrum against resistant organisms. Administered via IV or IM route, CEFEZONE-S provides excellent tissue penetration, reliable clinical efficacy, and convenient once-daily dosing in many cases, promoting faster recovery and improved patient outcomes.
Drops (Simethicone + Dill Oil + Fennel Oil) is a gentle

formulation specially designed to relieve infantile colic, gas, bloating, abdominal discomfort, and excessive crying caused by trapped air in the digestive tract. Simethicone helps break down gas bubbles for easy elimination, while Dill Oil and Fennel Oil provide natural carminative and antispasmodic effects that soothe the digestive system.
Drops offer fast and effective relief from tummy discomfort, promote comfortable digestion, and help infants feed and sleep better. With its pleasant taste and easy-to-administer drop formulation,
Drops support infant comfort and provide reassurance for parents and caregivers.

is a potent HMG-CoA reductase inhibitor (statin) indicated for the management of hypercholesterolemia, mixed dyslipidemia, and the prevention of cardiovascular disease. Atorvastatin effectively lowers LDL cholesterol and triglycerides while increasing HDL cholesterol, helping reduce the risk of heart attack, stroke, and other cardiovascular events. Available in

, ATROCLASS offers flexible dose titration to meet individual patient needs. With convenient once-daily dosing, proven efficacy, and excellent tolerability, ATROCLASS supports long-term lipid control, cardiovascular protection, and improved overall heart health.
LAPIPERA® 4.5 g Injection (Piperacillin 4 g + Tazobactam 0.5 g)

is a broad-spectrum antibiotic combination indicated for the treatment of moderate to severe bacterial infections, including hospital-acquired pneumonia, complicated urinary tract and intra-abdominal infections, skin and soft tissue infections, gynecological infections, and septicemia.
inhibits bacterial cell wall synthesis, while

is a beta-lactamase inhibitor that protects piperacillin from enzymatic degradation, extending its activity against resistant organisms. Administered by intravenous infusion, LAPIPERA provides broad antimicrobial coverage, excellent tissue penetration, and reliable clinical efficacy, helping achieve rapid infection control, reduce complications, and improve patient outcomes.
1000 Tablets (Metformin Hydrochloride Sustained Release 500 mg & 1000 mg)
is a sustained-release antidiabetic medication indicated for the management of

alongside diet and exercise. Metformin reduces hepatic glucose production, improves insulin sensitivity, and enhances peripheral glucose uptake without stimulating insulin secretion, resulting in a low risk of hypoglycemia. The sustained-release formulation provides prolonged glycemic control with improved gastrointestinal tolerability and convenient once-daily dosing, promoting better patient adherence. Available in
, METCLASS SR effectively helps achieve optimal blood glucose control, supports long-term metabolic health, and reduces the risk of diabetes-related complications.
Each Vial Contains: Amoxicillin Sodium BP eq. to Amoxicillin…………1000 mg Potassium Clavulanate BP eq. to Clavulanic Acid.200 mg Excipients……………………………………………………..
IMUCLAV® 1.2 g Injection (Amoxicillin 1000 mg + Clavulanic Acid 200 mg)

is a broad-spectrum injectable antibiotic combination indicated for the treatment of moderate to severe bacterial infections, including respiratory tract, urinary tract, skin and soft tissue, intra-abdominal, bone and joint infections, and septicemia.
inhibits bacterial cell wall synthesis, while

is a beta-lactamase inhibitor that protects amoxicillin from enzymatic degradation, extending its activity against resistant bacteria. Administered by IV injection or infusion, IMUCLAV 1.2 g provides rapid and effective infection control, excellent tissue penetration, reliable clinical efficacy, and supports faster recovery with improved patient outcomes.
Each coated tablet of R-Lume 20/120 contains :-
Each coated tablet of R-Lume 40/240 contains :-
are artemisinin-based combination therapies (ACTs) indicated for the treatment of uncomplicated
malaria, including infections caused by multidrug-resistant strains.
rapidly reduces parasite burden through free radical-mediated parasite destruction, while

, with its longer half-life, eliminates residual parasites and helps prevent recrudescence. This complementary dual-action provides rapid fever clearance, high cure rates, and reduces the risk of resistance development. Available in
, R-LUME offers age-appropriate dosing, excellent tolerability, and reliable efficacy, ensuring complete parasite clearance, faster recovery, and improved patient outcomes.
MEROCLASS® 500 mg & 1 g Injection (Meropenem for Injection USP)

is a broad-spectrum carbapenem antibiotic indicated for the treatment of severe and complicated bacterial infections, including pneumonia, intra-abdominal infections, urinary tract infections, skin and soft tissue infections, septicemia, bacterial meningitis, and infections caused by multidrug-resistant organisms.
works by inhibiting bacterial cell wall synthesis, resulting in rapid bactericidal activity against a wide range of Gram-positive, Gram-negative, and anaerobic bacteria. Available in

, MEROCLASS provides excellent tissue penetration, proven clinical efficacy, and reliable intravenous therapy for critically ill patients, helping achieve rapid infection control and improved clinical outcomes.

GLIMSY® 1 mg, 2 mg & 4 mg Tablets (Glimepiride USP) is a once-daily sulfonylurea indicated for the management of Type 2 Diabetes Mellitus as an adjunct to diet and exercise. Glimepiride stimulates pancreatic beta cells to increase insulin secretion and improves peripheral glucose utilization, helping achieve effective

control. Available in 1 mg, 2 mg, and 4 mg strengths, GLIMSY allows flexible dose titration according to individual patient needs. It effectively lowers fasting and postprandial blood glucose levels, supports long-term diabetes management, and helps reduce the risk of diabetes-related complications while offering convenient dosing, proven efficacy, and good patient tolerability.
Glow Act Cream is a herbal skin care formulation enriched with
Aloe Indica, Calendula officinalis, and Bee's Wax

that helps nourish, soothe, and protect the skin. It is designed to reduce the appearance of blemishes, acne marks, pigmentation, and uneven skin tone while maintaining skin hydration. Regular use helps promote a healthier, softer, smoother, and naturally radiant complexion. Suitable for daily external use, Glow Act Cream supports long-lasting skin wellness and protection from environmental damage

Monsieur Capsules are a premium herbal formulation specially designed to support male vitality, stamina, and overall sexual wellness. Enriched with carefully selected natural ingredients, they help improve energy levels, physical performance, and confidence while promoting healthy reproductive function. The capsules may assist in enhancing libido, supporting erectile function, increasing endurance, and helping manage premature ejaculation. Their antioxidant and rejuvenating properties contribute to overall well-being and reduce fatigue associated with stress and an active lifestyle. Suitable for adult men, Monsieur Capsules are formulated to provide safe, effective, and long-lasting support for maintaining strength, vitality, and a satisfying quality of life when used regularly.

Cough-Off Syrup is a herbal cough formula developed to provide effective relief from both dry and productive cough while soothing throat irritation. Enriched with carefully selected herbal ingredients, it helps loosen mucus, ease congestion, and support healthy respiratory function. Its natural expectorant and soothing properties help calm persistent coughing, reduce throat discomfort, and promote easier breathing. The sugar-free variant is suitable for individuals who prefer reduced sugar intake, including many people with diabetes, when used under
medical guidance. Cough-Off Syrup is gentle enough for daily use as directed and supports faster recovery while maintaining overall respiratory comfort and wellness.
Metclass G1 and Metclass G2 are oral antidiabetic tablets formulated to help achieve effective glycemic control in adults with

to provide dual-action blood glucose management by enhancing insulin release and reducing hepatic glucose production while improving insulin sensitivity. These formulations help control both fasting and postprandial blood sugar levels, support long-term HbA1c reduction, and may lower the risk of diabetes-related complications when used alongside a healthy diet and regular exercise. Metclass G1 and G2 should be taken only under the guidance of a qualified healthcare professional.
Each 5 ml. of the reconstituted suspension contains :
Excipients q.s. In a flavoured syrupy base.
When reconstituted as directed, Each 5 ml. of the reconstituted suspension contains :
Diluted Potassium Clavulanate BP equivalent to
Excipients q.s. In a flavoured syrupy base
IMUCLAV DUO / IMUCLAV ULTRA – Short Description

IMUCLAV DUO and IMUCLAV ULTRA are broad-spectrum antibiotic dry syrups containing Amoxicillin and Clavulanic Acid, formulated to effectively treat a wide range of bacterial infections in children. The combination works by eliminating infection-causing bacteria while overcoming bacterial resistance through the action of clavulanic acid. These formulations are commonly prescribed for respiratory tract infections, ear,

nose and throat infections, urinary tract infections, skin and soft tissue infections, and dental infections. Available in pleasant-tasting pediatric formulations for easy administration, IMUCLAV DUO and ULTRA help ensure reliable infection control and faster recovery when used under the guidance of a qualified healthcare professional.
Each 5 ml. of the reconstituted suspension contains :

use to treat a wide range of bacterial infections. It belongs to the macrolide class of antibiotics and works by inhibiting bacterial protein synthesis, effectively stopping the growth of susceptible bacteria. IZ-200 is commonly prescribed for respiratory tract infections, ear, nose and throat infections, skin and soft tissue infections, and certain other bacterial illnesses. Its pleasant lime

and easy-to-reconstitute suspension improve compliance in children. IZ-200 should be used only under the supervision of a qualified healthcare professional and completed as prescribed to ensure effective treatment and reduce antibiotic resistance.

is an advanced topical pain relief formulation designed to provide fast and effective relief from muscle and joint pain. Its powerful muscle relaxant and anti-inflammatory ingredients help reduce pain, stiffness, swelling, and muscle spasms while improving mobility and comfort. The cream is beneficial for sprains, strains, sports injuries, backache, neck pain, arthritis, and other musculoskeletal conditions. Its non-greasy, fast-

absorbing formula penetrates deeply to deliver targeted relief without leaving a sticky residue. Suitable for adults, PKG Cream supports quicker recovery and improved daily movement when used regularly as directed by a healthcare professional.

are a herbal weight management formulation designed to support healthy and gradual weight loss without causing weakness or fatigue. Enriched with carefully selected natural ingredients, they help boost metabolism, promote fat breakdown, reduce excess appetite, and support better digestion. FITJOY may assist in managing obesity associated with sedentary lifestyles, hormonal imbalances, thyroid disorders, diabetes, hypertension, and other metabolic conditions when combined with a balanced diet and regular physical activity. The capsules help improve energy levels while maintaining overall wellness, making them a safe and effective option for individuals seeking sustainable weight management under the guidance of a healthcare professional.
is a broad-spectrum antibiotic tablet containing

, formulated to treat a wide range of bacterial infections. This combination effectively kills susceptible bacteria while clavulanic acid inhibits beta-lactamase enzymes, helping overcome bacterial resistance and enhancing the antibiotic's effectiveness. IMUCLAV-1000 is commonly prescribed for respiratory tract infections, ear, nose and throat infections, urinary tract infections, skin and soft tissue infections, dental infections, and bone and joint infections. It helps provide rapid symptom relief and promotes faster recovery when taken as prescribed. IMUCLAV-1000 should be used only under the supervision of a qualified healthcare professional.
